decks.notes: The deck focuses on using cards like Generous Ent, Endurance, and Living End to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and then cascade into Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield. The deck also includes cards like Force of Negation and Subtlety for disruption and protection. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a sudden influx of creatures while controlling the board with counter spells and removal. The key strategy relies on combo-ing off to establish a dominant board presence and secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Allosaurus Combo, utilizing cards like Allosaurus Rider, Eldritch Evolution, and Neoform to bring out powerful creatures like Griselbrand or Xenagos, God of Revels. The deck also includes ways to protect the combo with Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer, as well as ways to generate mana and search for key pieces with cards like Nourishing Shoal and Summoner's Pact. The deck aims to combo off quickly and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and game-ending plays.

The deck focuses on ramping quickly with cards like Arboreal Grazer and Amulet of Vigor to get Primeval Titan out early and search for lands like Vesuva and Lotus Field. The key strategy is to use cards like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith to assemble a combo that allows for explosive mana generation and chaining together powerful land-based abilities. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its synergy between lands, creatures, and spells to quickly establish a dominant board presence and win the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive Boros creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and deal damage efficiently. It also includes cards that can provide additional value, such as creating tokens or utilizing the graveyard. The deck aims to maintain board presence and apply pressure early on, while also having the ability to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Blood Moon and Ranger-Captain of Eos. The combination of efficient creatures, burn spells, and disruption tools makes this deck a formidable and proactive force in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on utilizing Allosaurus Rider and Neoform to quickly assemble the Allosaurus Combo, allowing you to ramp into powerful creatures like Griselbrand or Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. The deck also includes tools like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer to protect your combo pieces and disrupt your opponent's game plan. With access to Eldritch Evolution and Planar Genesis, you have a variety of ways to tutor for key pieces and overwhelm your opponent with big creatures. The deck aims to execute its combo efficiently and dominate the game with its powerful threats.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. The deck also includes powerful support cards like Goblin Bombardment and Guide of Souls to control the board and deal direct damage. With cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Thraben Charm providing buffs and removal, this deck aims to win the game swiftly by putting pressure on the opponent and dominating the battlefield. The inclusion of cards like The Legend of Roku and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker add versatility and unpredictability to the deck.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruption spells. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Urza's Saga, the deck can quickly ramp up and flood the board with powerful artifact creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary. Engineered Explosives and Sink into Stupor provide additional removal and disruption, while cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Metallic Rebuke offer card advantage and countermagic. The inclusion of cards like Claws of Gix and Pithing Needle help to further disrupt the opponent's game plan, making it difficult for them to mount a defense.

The main concept of this UW Control deck is to use counterspells, board wipes, and card draw to control the game and slow down the opponent's strategies. By utilizing cards like Narset, Parter of Veils for card advantage and Orim's Chant to stop opponents from casting spells during their turn, the deck aims to maintain control of the board and out-value the opponent. With a mix of counterspells, removal, and powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria, the deck aims to control the game and eventually win through card advantage and incremental advantage.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly flood the board with aggressive creatures like Guide of Souls, Ocelot Pride, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, supported by powerful spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to control the board. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional buffs and utility, while Goblin Bombardment adds direct damage potential. The inclusion of Seasoned Pyromancer and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker offers card advantage and flexibility, allowing the deck to maintain pressure and close out games swiftly. Arena of Glory serves as a powerful anthem effect to boost the team's prowess.

The deck aims to control the game through ramping up mana quickly with Eldrazi Temple and Utopia Sprawl, allowing for the early play of big creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Return provide board control, while Karn, the Great Creator can shut down opponent's artifacts. Sowing Mycospawn generates token creatures for defense and offense. The deck also has some land destruction with Ghost Quarter and Bojuka Bog, as well as versatality with Kozilek's Command. Overall, the strategy revolves around quickly getting out powerful Eldrazi creatures and controlling the game.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. The deck includes powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, supported by various instant spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm. The inclusion of cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ocelot Pride helps boost the aggression of the deck, while cards like Goblin Bombardment provide additional reach and damage potential. The deck also features some disruptive elements like Blood Moon to disrupt opponent's mana base.

The deck focuses on quick and aggressive plays, utilizing cards that can both deal damage and protect your creatures. It also includes cards that allow for temporary exile, returning them to the battlefield with powerful effects. By combining fast creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer with blink effects like Ephemerate, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Galvanic Discharge helps control the board while cards like Consign to Memory provide card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to create a fast-paced and synergistic strategy to outpace and outmaneuver opponents.

This mono green aggro deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with high-powered creatures such as Old-Growth Troll and Endurance, supported by mana dorks like Noble Hierarch and Ignoble Hierarch. Cards like Aspect of Hydra and Vines of Vastwood help to pump up your creatures for big swings. Green Sun's Zenith allows for flexible creature tutoring, while cards like Disciple of Freyalise and Sylvan Safekeeper provide additional utility and protection. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with efficient threats and aggressive plays, aiming to finish the game swiftly.

This deck focuses on utilizing powerful creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm and defeat the opponent. With aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and creatures that can be pumped up like Guide of Souls, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain a strong board presence. Additionally, the inclusion of burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment adds reach and removal options to finish off opponents or deal with threats. The versatile Ajani, Nacatl Pariah also provides additional options for removal or card advantage.

This deck aims to aggressively power out large threats like Hollow One and Vengevine early in the game, using cards like Faithless Looting and Burning Inquiry to quickly cycle through the deck and get them onto the battlefield. The graveyard synergies with cards like Detective's Phoenix and Vengevine allow for explosive turns and overwhelming board presence. By constantly pressuring the opponent with fast, high-powered creatures, the deck seeks to overwhelm and outpace the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on using a variety of creatures as tools to create powerful combos and synergies, utilizing cards like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Yawgmoth, Thran Physician to generate value and control the board. The creatures in the deck serve different purposes, such as providing utility, removal, or recursion, allowing for flexibility in various game situations. The inclusion of cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Chord of Calling helps to search for key pieces of the combo, while Boseiju, Who Endures provides protection for important spells. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through its toolbox of creatures.
